bundles.title: Define InteractionRecord types and schemas
bundles.goal: Define ApprovalRecord, ClarifyRecord types and their JSON Schema validation in src/types/ and dist/package/global/schemas/.

tasks.title: Define ApprovalRecord type with fields: record_id, record_kind ('approval'), run_id, actor (ActorIdentity), phase_from, phase_to, timestamp, decision
Define ClarifyRecord type with fields: record_id, record_kind ('clarify'), run_id, actor, question, context?, answer?, question_event_id?, timestamp, status ('pending' | 'answered')
Define InteractionRecord discriminated union (ApprovalRecord | ClarifyRecord) and RecordKind type
Implement generateRecordId(kind, runId, sequence) helper function returning '<kind>-<runId>-<sequence>' format
Create JSON Schema files for approval-record.schema.json and clarify-record.schema.json in dist/package/global/schemas/interaction-records/
Add schema validation for InteractionRecord types consistent with existing contract validation patterns

bundles.title: Define InteractionRecordStore interface and LocalFs implementation
bundles.goal: Create the InteractionRecordStore interface and LocalFsInteractionRecordStore that persists records to .specflow/runs/<runId>/records/<recordId>.json.

tasks.title: Define InteractionRecordStore interface with methods: write(record), read(runId, recordId), list(runId), exists(runId, recordId)
Implement LocalFsInteractionRecordStore with file layout .specflow/runs/<runId>/records/<recordId>.json
Implement atomic write (write-to-temp + rename) in LocalFsInteractionRecordStore.write()
Implement createLocalFsInteractionRecordStore(projectRoot) factory function following existing store factory patterns
Create InMemoryInteractionRecordStore for test use following existing test helper patterns

bundles.title: Integrate record creation into advance transition handler
bundles.goal: Extend AdvanceDeps with optional records field and create interaction records synchronously during approval/clarify transitions.

tasks.title: Add optional records?: InteractionRecordStore to AdvanceDeps interface
Identify and document which transitions require record creation (approval gate, clarify request, clarify response)
Implement record creation logic in advanceRun for approval-related transitions: create ApprovalRecord and write via records store
Implement record creation logic in advanceRun for clarify-related transitions: create ClarifyRecord and write via records store
Ensure record write failure causes transition failure (synchronous error propagation)
When records is undefined, skip record creation and allow transition to succeed (backward compatibility)

bundles.title: Add record_ref to RunHistoryEntry
bundles.goal: Extend RunHistoryEntry with optional record_ref field and populate it during record-associated transitions in advance.ts.

tasks.title: Add optional record_ref?: string to RunHistoryEntry interface in src/types/contracts.ts
Update history entry creation in advance.ts (lines 74-82) to include record_id when a record was created for the transition
Update any JSON Schema for RunHistoryEntry if one exists to include optional record_ref field

bundles.title: Add record_id to surface event payloads
bundles.goal: Extend ApprovalPayload, ClarifyRequestPayload, and ClarifyResponsePayload with record_id field and update corresponding JSON Schema files.

tasks.title: Add record_id: string to ApprovalPayload in src/contracts/surface-events.ts
Add record_id: string to ClarifyRequestPayload in src/contracts/surface-events.ts
Add record_id: string to ClarifyResponsePayload in src/contracts/surface-events.ts
Update approval-payload.schema.json to include record_id as required string field
Update clarify-request-payload.schema.json to include record_id as required string field
Update clarify-response-payload.schema.json to include record_id as required string field

bundles.title: Tests and verification for interaction record persistence
bundles.goal: Add comprehensive tests covering record creation, store operations, advance integration, and backward compatibility, then run all verification steps.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for generateRecordId helper function
Write unit tests for InMemoryInteractionRecordStore (write, read, list, exists)
Write integration tests for LocalFsInteractionRecordStore (file creation, atomic write, directory structure)
Write tests for advance with records injected: verify record creation on approval transitions
Write tests for advance with records injected: verify record creation on clarify transitions
Write tests for advance with records undefined: verify transitions succeed without record creation (backward compat)
Write tests verifying record_ref is populated in RunHistoryEntry for record-associated transitions
Write tests verifying record write failure causes transition failure
Run formatting, linting, type checking, and full test suite; fix any failures
